entities.createSql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`id` INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL, `treeUri` TEXT NOT NULL, `displayPath` TEXT NOT NULL, `dateAddedMs` INTEGER NOT NULL)

indices.name: index_source_folder_treeUri
indices.createSql: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_source_folder_treeUri` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`treeUri`)
